name: diarization-pyannote
description: Higher-accuracy speaker diarization via the pyannote.audio pretrained pipeline. Requires a HuggingFace token + license acceptance. Provides a model for the diarization use-case; bind it in Settings → Models. Large install (pulls torch).
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: HuggingFace Token
x-meta.help: Required. Accept the pyannote/speaker-diarization-3.1 license on HuggingFace, then paste a read token.
